summary: Completed frontend testing of the Online Viewer ecosystem. Tested all 14 features including viewer hub, 5 individual viewer pages, PPTX/EML file uploads, View History, Navbar link, Home page card, file size limits, and sitemap.

ui_bugs.issue: Shapes with no position data (missing a:xfrm) have width=0, height=0 and become invisible due to overflow:hidden. The test PPTX has text shapes but no spPr/xfrm, so the slide renders blank white. Real PPTX files from PowerPoint always include shape bounds, but the code should add a fallback (e.g., cx=0 → fill full slide width).
When history entry is missing fileSize field, displays 'NaN MB · NaNd ago'. Should handle missing fields gracefully with fallback strings.

issues: Thumbnail strip buttons exist in DOM but appear as blank white boxes (same zero-dimension issue as main slide). No visual thumbnails shown for the test file.

action_items: PptxViewer: Add fallback dimensions when cx=0 or cy=0 (e.g., default to slide width/height). This ensures text shapes without explicit bounds are still visible: if cx === 0, use dims.w; if cy === 0, use auto/dims.h.
ViewHistory: Guard against missing/undefined fileSize — show '-' or '?' instead of NaN.
Sitemap /sitemap/0.xml returns 404 in preview environment — verify Next.js sitemap generation is working in production build (may be dev-mode limitation).
critical_code_review_comments: PptxViewer.tsx line 102-103: cx and cy default to 0 when a:xfrm is missing. Combined with overflow:hidden (line 180), this causes zero-size invisible shapes. Fix: `const cx = parseInt(attr(ext, 'a:ext', 'cx') || '0') * EMU2PX || dims.w` as fallback.
ViewHistory.tsx: HistoryEntry type should make fileSize optional and the display logic should guard against undefined/NaN.

Sitemap: /sitemap/0.xml returns 404 — in Next.js 13+ app router, generateSitemaps() creates /sitemap/0.xml routes but this requires a production build to work correctly. Dev mode may not support this properly.

success_rate.frontend: 85% (12/14 features fully working, 1 partial - PPTX content blank with minimal test file, 1 failing - sitemap 404)

seed_data_creation: Manually set localStorage key 'viewer_history' to test View History on hub page
context_for_next_testing_agent: All viewer pages load correctly. EML viewer works perfectly with test.eml. PPTX viewer shows slide stage and Prev/Next but content is blank for the minimal test.pptx due to missing shape position data (a:xfrm). View History works correctly. Sitemap 404 may be a dev-mode limitation.

PPTX_blank_slide.issue: PPTX visual renderer shows blank white slide when uploading test.pptx
PPTX_blank_slide.root_cause: The test PPTX file (/tmp/test.pptx) is a minimal 1979-byte file with p:sp shapes that lack p:spPr/a:xfrm elements (no position/size data). PptxViewer.tsx line 100-103 parses x/y/cx/cy from a:xfrm, defaulting to 0 when missing. SlideCanvas renders shapes at position (0,0) with width=0, height=0, and overflow:hidden makes them invisible.
PPTX_blank_slide.fix: In parsePptx(), add fallback dimensions: if cx===0 use slideW*EMU2PX (full slide width), if cy===0 use a reasonable text box height (e.g., slideH*EMU2PX/4)
PPTX_blank_slide.reproduction: Upload /tmp/test.pptx to /en/view/pptx — slide renders blank white despite file having 2 text shapes
